output.code:
# load the file
path = "/mnt/data/file-55NrTEFRMwFD6rWgV3gBZD-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    data_bytes = f.read()
data = data_bytes.decode('utf-8')
len(data), data[:400]

raw = data
verse = "وَالَّذِينَ إِذَا أَسَرُّواْ قَالُواْ أَسْتَغْفِرُواْ لَهُمْ وَإِذَا لَقُواْ لَعَنُوهُمْ وَإِذَا سَمِعُواْ كُلَّمَةٍ مِّنَ الظَّالِمِينَ لَتَأْخُذَهُمْ عَنْهَا يَعْلَمُ اللّهُ أَنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّتُؤْخَذُونَ فَكَثِيرًا وَمَا اللّهُ بِغَافِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ"
idx = raw.find(verse)
idx, raw[idx:idx+len(verse)] == verse

hadith = "من رأى منكم منكراً فليغيره بيده، فإن لم يستطع فبلسانه، فإن لم يستطع فبقلبه، وذلك أضعف الإيمان"
occurrences = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = raw.find(hadith, start)
    if i==-1:
        break
    occurrences.append(i)
    start = i+1
occurrences, len(occurrences)

for i in occurrences:
    s = max(0,i-40)
    e = i+len(hadith)+60
    print("Index:", i)
    print(repr(raw[s:e]))
    print()

spans = []
# verse
v = verse
v_idx = raw.find(v)
v_end = v_idx + len(v)
assert raw[v_idx:v_end] == v
spans.append({"start": v_idx, "end": v_end, "text": v, "type": "Aya"})

# hadith occurrences
for i in occurrences:
    s = i
    e = s + len(hadith)
    assert raw[s:e] == hadith, (i, raw[s:e], hadith)
    spans.append({"start": s, "end": e, "text": hadith, "type": "Hadeeth"})

spans
